description: Fix all previously-skipped LIBERO tests now that av, huggingface_hub, and youmu Rust extension are available, and add synthetic dataset fixtures for CI

userStories.title: Add synthetic LIBERO dataset fixture in conftest
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a shared pytest fixture that generates a minimal synthetic LIBERO dataset in a temp directory so integration tests can run without the real /mnt/local/localcache00/ mount.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/data/conftest.py with a session-scoped fixture 'synthetic_libero_dir' that creates a temp directory with episode-per-file layout
Fixture creates data/chunk-000/ with 3 small episode parquet files (episode_000000.parquet through episode_000002.parquet)
Fixture creates meta/episodes.jsonl with matching metadata (episode_index, tasks, length)
Parquet files use correct schema: state (fixed_size_list<float>[8]), actions (fixed_size_list<float>[7]), image (struct<bytes: binary, path: string>)
Each episode parquet has 5-10 rows with deterministic data (seeded random)
Parquet files are readable by both PyArrow and the youmu Rust ParquetReaderCachePy
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use plain/non-dict-encoded columns to avoid Rust reader panics. Use pyarrow.FixedSizeListArray.from_arrays and pyarrow.StructArray.from_arrays for schema construction.

userStories.title: Run and fix raw parquet parity tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the 7 TestRawParquetParity tests in test_youmu_lerobot_parity.py to pass so I can confirm libero and libero_64KB are byte-identical at the parquet level.
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 raw parquet tests pass: test_same_number_of_files, test_same_row_counts, test_state_data_identical, test_actions_data_identical, test_image_bytes_identical, test_metadata_episode_count_matches, test_metadata_episode_lengths_match
If any test fails, diagnose whether it's a data issue or test logic issue and fix accordingly
All existing unit tests in the same file still pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: These tests use PyArrow directly (no youmu/lerobot dependency). They only need the two data directories to exist. Skip conditions should now evaluate to not-skipped.

userStories.title: Run and fix backend parity tests (youmu vs LeRobot)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the 5 TestBackendParity tests in test_youmu_lerobot_parity.py to pass so I can verify youmu and LeRobot produce identical outputs for the same LIBERO dataset.
acceptanceCriteria: test_dataset_lengths_match passes — both backends produce same total anchor frames
test_state_parity passes — observation.state tensors are byte-identical for boundary + random indices
test_action_parity passes — action tensors are exactly equal (torch.equal)
test_image_parity passes — observation.images.image tensors are pixel-perfect identical
test_episode_index_parity passes — episode_index scalar values match
If any test fails, root-cause and fix the underlying code (youmu dataset, lerobot adapter, or test itself)
All existing unit tests still pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Requires both data dirs and both backends (youmu Rust + lerobot+av). Test creates a temporary v3.0-compatible directory to bridge v2.0 dataset format with lerobot 0.4.4. Key mappings: youmu observation.state→lerobot state, youmu action→lerobot actions, youmu observation.images.image→lerobot image. Youmu action timestamps start at t+1 (next frame), not t+0.

userStories.title: Run and fix LiberoYoumuDataset integration tests and add synthetic variants
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the 6 TestGetItemRealDataset tests in test_libero_dataset_episode_per_file.py to pass with real data, and also add synthetic-data variants using the fixture from US-001.
acceptanceCriteria: test_dataset_length passes — dataset has >0 anchor frames
test_getitem_returns_standard_keys passes — output dict has observation.state, action, observation.images.image, episode_index, frame_index
test_getitem_state_shape passes — shape is (1, 8) for obs_len=1
test_getitem_action_shape passes — shape is (4, 7) for pred_len=4
test_getitem_image_shape passes — 4D uint8 tensor with 3 channels
test_getitem_finite_values passes — no NaN/inf in state or action
Add a TestGetItemSyntheticDataset class using the synthetic_libero_dir fixture that runs equivalent checks
All existing unit tests (TestLoadChunkEpisodePerFile, TestSchemaColumnDetection) still pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Synthetic tests may have different expected shapes if the fixture uses different state/action dimensions — use the same dims (8 for state, 7 for actions) in the fixture.

userStories.title: Run and fix real-data task description tests and add synthetic variants
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the 2 TestRealData tests in test_libero_task_descriptions.py to pass with real data, and also add synthetic-data variants using the fixture from US-001.
acceptanceCriteria: test_load_from_real_jsonl passes — loads real episodes.jsonl, all keys are non-negative ints, all values are non-empty strings
test_all_episodes_have_descriptions passes — every JSONL line maps to a dict entry
Add a TestSyntheticData class using the synthetic_libero_dir fixture that runs equivalent checks on synthetic episodes.jsonl
All existing unit tests (12 tests) still pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Uses importlib + sys.modules mock-patching to bypass heavy veomni import chain. Synthetic tests should use same pattern.

userStories.title: Full LIBERO test suite green run
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to run the full LIBERO-related test suite and confirm everything passes end-to-end with zero skips.
acceptanceCriteria: pytest tests/data/test_youmu_lerobot_parity.py -v — all 12 tests pass (0 skipped)
pytest tests/data/test_libero_dataset_episode_per_file.py -v — all tests pass including new synthetic tests (0 skipped)
pytest tests/data/test_libero_task_descriptions.py -v — all tests pass including new synthetic tests (0 skipped)
pytest tests/data/test_libero_metadata_jsonl.py -v — all 8 tests pass
No warnings about missing imports for av, huggingface_hub, lerobot, or youmu
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is a validation-only story. No code changes expected — just run all tests and confirm green. If anything fails, go back and fix in the relevant story.
